title: Temporary Workforce Solutions | H-2 Visas | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Temporary workforce solutions | H-2 visas
The H-2A and H-2B visa programs permit U.S. businesses to hire foreign nationals for temporary jobs.
BAL’s H-2 attorney team, led by Ashley Foret Dees and Jeff Joseph , has extensive experience in temporary workforce immigration. They can offer advanced legal strategies to improve your chances of obtaining H-2A and H-2B visas for the workers you need to keep your operations running smoothly.

## Leading expertise in seasonal work visas

### Avoid costly errors and delays
Let BAL handle the complex, confusing application process. Missed the application window for H-2B visas? We offer multiple creative strategies to keep your valued employees anyway.

### Have confidence in compliance
We assist in training your staff to ensure compliance with state wage transparency laws, documentation requirements and annual changes to H-2B rules.

### Leverage top immigration outsourcing services
BAL helps prepare you for wage and hour investigations, in-person visits from government agents, including ICE and DOL and can represent you before government agencies.

### Successfully manage government H-2 inquiries
We not only provide continuously updated alerts on frequently changing rules and regulations, but also explain what they mean for your business — the opportunities and challenges.

### Stay ahead of ever-evolving H-2 regulations
We can also work with you to assess whether any of your H-2 or other foreign national employees are eligible for green cards.

## Contact us about your H-2 visa workforce.
